title: These 20 growth stocks are worth considering on a pullback, says Citi
text: Citi has released a list of 20 large-cap growth stocks that it says present opportunities in the event of a pullback.

title: 11 Beaten-Up Growth Stocks That Look Like Buys, Says Citi
text: Chipotle, Draftkings, Lam Research and eight other stocks may be underappreciated by investors, according to a screen run by Citi analysts.

title: The Ultimate Stocks to Buy: 7 Top-Rated, Options-Backed and Wall Street-Approved Picks
text: While wading through difficult waters, investors would be wise to lean into stocks to buy that come with Wall Street's seal of approval. Let's face it: while analysts and experts occasionally miss the mark, more often than not, they nail it.
